LanguageData.RB_GoldGrateTile.description: For idiotic and overbearing extravagance, nothing beats gold grate tiles. They are exceptionally expensive, and exceptionally beautiful, and people will think you're exceptionally snobbish if you actually live on them. They are very quick to clean and get a bonus to cleanliness.
LanguageData.RB_GoldGrateTile.label: gold grate tile
LanguageData.RB_GoldStuddedTile.description: For overbearing extravagance, few things beat studded gold tiles. They are exceptionally expensive, and exceptionally beautiful, and people will think you're exceptionally snobbish if you actually live on them.
LanguageData.RB_GoldStuddedTile.label: gold studded tile
LanguageData.RB_MetalGrateTile.description: Steel grate tiles, for that spaceship workshop look. They are very quick to clean and get a bonus to cleanliness for use in medical settings.
LanguageData.RB_MetalGrateTile.label: steel grate tile
LanguageData.RB_MetalStuddedTile.description: Steel studded tiles, for that spaceship look. They are quick to clean and get a bonus to cleanliness for use in medical settings.
LanguageData.RB_MetalStuddedTile.label: steel studded tile
LanguageData.RB_SilverGrateTile.description: For a futuristic but royal look, silver grate tiles fit perfectly into luxurious workshops or armories. They are very quick to clean and get a bonus to cleanliness.
LanguageData.RB_SilverGrateTile.label: silver grate tile
LanguageData.RB_SilverStuddedTile.description: For a futuristic but royal look, silver studded tiles fit perfectly into luxurious rooms. They are quick to clean and get a bonus to cleanliness.
LanguageData.RB_SilverStuddedTile.label: silver studded tile
LanguageData.RB_SterileGrateTile.description: Sterile grate tiles with special cleanliness-enhancing properties. Extra-clean rooms improve outcomes in hospitals and research labs. This tile is very slow to build, but very quick to clean.
LanguageData.RB_SterileGrateTile.label: sterile grate tile
LanguageData.RB_SterileStuddedTile.description: Sterile studded tiles with special cleanliness-enhancing properties. Extra-clean rooms improve outcomes in hospitals and research labs. This tile is very slow to build, but quick to clean.
LanguageData.RB_SterileStuddedTile.label: sterile studded tile
LanguageData.RB_BurnedFineWoodPlankFloor.label: burned wood floor
LanguageData.RB_FinePlankWood.label: fine wood floor
LanguageData.RB_PavedTile_Transhumanist.description: Concrete tiles with a hexagonal pattern for that ultra-technological look. Cheap, but neutral in terms of looks and slow to build.
LanguageData.RB_PavedTile_Transhumanist.label: paved hex tile
LanguageData.RB_WoodPlankFloor_Transhumanist.descript: Wood plank flooring with a hexagonal pattern for that ultra-technological look. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.RB_WoodPlankFloor_Transhumanist.label: wood hex floor
